fail_closed_refusals: missing or malformed Dev result packet
completed Dev result without evidence refs
changed file outside dispatch allowed paths
produced artifact outside dispatch allowed paths
Dev result claiming complete controlled cycle
same QA actor and executor identity without explicit non-self-certification independence boundary
QA signoff without source evidence refs
QA signoff accepting executor narration as proof

QA signoff claiming broad autonomy, productization, runtime, orchestration, unattended resume, solved compaction, broad CI/product coverage, production runtime, general Codex reliability, or successor milestone
source_evidence_requirement: QA signoff packets must consume Dev evidence refs as source evidence. Executor narration, executor self-certification, or Dev result status alone is not QA authority.
non_scope: no R12 or successor milestone opening
required_non_claims: no Dev result accepted as QA authority
no QA has run a full controlled cycle
no successor milestone without explicit approval
